effects_provenance.raw: Pink Certz THCA Flower Supreme / 3.5g Strain Profile Pink Certz THCA Flower is a hybrid bred by Compound Genetics , crossing The Menthol with Grape Gasoline . The pedigree is real: a Pink Certz cut from Sense SF won the 2022 Transbay Challenge in San Francisco. Buds run frost-heavy with deep purple and pink expressions wrapped in dense trichome coverage. Effects Pink Certz delivers the kind of well-rounded hybrid lift that pairs equally well with conversation, creative work, or a long walk. The cerebral edge stays clear-headed without anxious tension; the body settles into a relaxed-but-not-sedated baseline. A reliable daytime-into-evening choice for users who want hybrid balance without giving up focus. Flavor & Aroma On the nose, Pink Certz is unmistakable: cool menthol up front, ripe grape candy in the middle, and a clean fuel finish from its Grape Gasoline parent. Smoke is smooth and mentholated with that Compound Genetics dessert-and-gas signature. The terpene profile leans loud and complex — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Pink Certz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Pink Certz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis (PDF) for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Pink Certz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Candy Grape hybrid Menthol THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Sour Bremix THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Bremix THCa Flower Strain? Dive into the unique world of Bremix THCa Flower , a strain that's as potent as it is aromatic. This powerhouse cannabis variety hits you with an initial sharp pungent aroma, quickly followed by a soothing citrus note, creating a sensory experience like no other. Its flavor profile is equally intense, reminiscent of a collision between a basket of lemons and a diesel truck. Visually, Bremix has dense trichome coverage, making it one of the most potent strains available. Bremix Terpenes The terpene profile of Bremix contributes to its distinctive character: Limonene : Brings the citrusy, uplifting scent that calms the initial sharp aroma, known for mood enhancement. Caryophyllene: Adds a spicy, peppery note, potentially aiding in stress relief and offering anti-inflammatory benefits. Pinene: Infuses a fresh pine scent, known to promote alertness and memory enhancement, balancing out the strain's complex aroma. These terpenes not only define the strain's scent but also amplify its effects, making bremix a memorable experience. Bremix Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 25.04% Total Cannabinoids: 27.35% D9-THC: 0.29% Bremix THCA Strain Effects B remix delivers an intense cerebral high that can spark creativity or deep thought. It uplifts the mood, providing a sense of euphoria through the combination of limonene and caryophyllene. Despite its potency, the strain can help maintain focus, thanks to pinene's alertness-promoting properties. Additionally, the unique aroma and flavor of Bremix can heighten sensory perception, making it a sensory delight. Genotype: Sour Bremix (Sour Punch x Bremix) Phenotype: Bremix Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection. effects_provenance.raw: Purple Churro THCa 14g Purple Churro THCa ( Cinnamon Horchata x Apples & Bananas ) is an indica-leaning hybrid that pairs dessert-like sweetness with a creamy, comforting depth. This batch shows off dense, frosty buds in shades of violet and lime green, with vivid orange hairs weaving through its sugary trichome coat. The aroma carries warm cinnamon and vanilla cream over subtle fruit, unfolding into hints of baked cake and faint gas. On the palate, it’s smooth and layered — sweet and doughy up front, with a gentle, gassy finish that rounds out the experience. Purple Churro brings a cozy, grounded calm without clouding the mind — ideal for winding down or savoring slow evenings. A strain that feels like comfort food in flower form. The experience begins with an uplifting mental shift, gently easing into a calming buzz that relieves tension without heavy sedation. Perfect for day or evening use, this strain adapts to how you want to feel—creative, chill, or somewhere in between.
